sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check which box moved after RIGHT.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Green boxes BEFORE:")
for n in before_seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nGreen boxes AFTER:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check if right green box is inside right charcoal box
print("\nRight charcoal box children:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['boundary'][0][1] >= 44:
        for c in n['children']:
            child = seg[c]
            print(f"  contains: {child['color']} (pixels={child['pixels']})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
RIGHT moved the right green box from cols 39-41 to cols 42-44. The left green box didn't move. So both LEFT and RIGHT only control the right green box. The left green box seems completely stuck.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal isn't to move the left green box at all. Maybe the goal is to position the right green box inside the right charcoal box in a specific way.
Currently the right green box is at cols 42-44, rows 27-29. The right charcoal box is at cols 44-48, rows 26-30. The green box overlaps with the charcoal box at col 44.
Let me try moving the right green box RIGHT by 1 more to get it fully inside the charcoal box (cols 45-47 would be the interior).
Wait, but the green box is 3x3 and the charcoal box interior is also 3x3 (cols 45-47, rows 27-29). So the green box should fit exactly inside!
Let me move RIGHT once more to get the green box to cols 45-47.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Right green box at cols 42-44, need cols 45-47 to fit inside charcoal box interior
# Move RIGHT 2 times (each moves ~3 cols based on earlier pattern)
# Actually earlier: LEFT moved from 42-44 to 39-41 (3 cols left), RIGHT moved 39-41 to 42-44 (3 cols right)
# So each action moves 3 columns. To go from 42-44 to 45-47, need 1 RIGHT
action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
